title: Over Earth
description: Creating a real world, by improving visuals, enhancing immersion, reworking generation and making it dynamically work together.
body:
_This modpack is designed to be vanilla+ and should be seen as an **addon** for the vanilla design/experience. This modpack can be used as a foundation for your personal modpack._

Over Earth showcases what Minecraft could have been, with new world generation and Distant Horizons. It is build around immersion using sound, animations and small details. It enhances the vanilla experience.
  
### Features:
- Heavy optimizations
- Distant Horizons
- Overhauled sound
- Immersive first person
- Enviromental details
- New world generation (including new structures)

### Preview
![Village on a hilltop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZgJ0J7z1/images/767972034cf4107d73d9b7b1f1b38ef5ad0a6f6c.webp)

![Massive forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZgJ0J7z1/images/7d3bc00358388feded8a1d9cedac8cfd5f749b67.webp)
_(Distant Horizons + Tectonic + Bliss Shaders)_

## FAQ:

<details>
<summary>What do I do?</summary>

An in-game 'tutorial' is planned. Craft a bowl to drink water at the start of the game. There are ways to filter and store water.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Poor performance</summary>

- You can enable/disable shaders by pressing **K**
- If the game is lagging or crashes, go to options on the modpack page in Modrinth and up the memory to **6 Gb (6000 Mb)** or more.
- The game will stutter upon loading a world for the first time. This is the chunk generation that Distant Horizons does. The stuttering will go away

</details>


<details>
<summary>Customize basic things</summary>

- You can toggle between normal, and enhanced first person using **F6**
- You can enable/disable the resourcepack **Unique Dark**

</details>
